violations.text: The non-food contact surfaces of the fan and shelving in sliding door refrigerators have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 10/01/2024
Several ceiling tiles in the back storage area is in poor repair/ missing. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 10/08/2024

The facility is lacking a mop sink. At least one mop sink or one curbed cleaning facility equipped with a floor drain must be provided and conveniently located for the cleaning of mops or similar wet floor cleaning tools and for the disposal of mop water and similar liquid waste. New Violation. Correct By: 05/23/2023
The door to the employee's toilet room is not self-closing. New Violation. Correct By: 06/08/2023
